actionCalls.name: Log_Fault_Failed_to_get_OLI
actionCalls.label: Log - Fault- Failed to get OLI

value.stringValue: Failed to get Opportunity Line Item

actionCalls.name: Log_Fault_Failed_to_get_Product_Lab_Order_Configuration
actionCalls.label: Log - Fault- Failed to get Product Lab Order Configuration

value.stringValue: Failed to get Product Lab Order Configuration
Successfully finished looping through line items
Autolaunch - Lab Order - Create Collection of Serviceable Items and Their Lab SKU's Flow Started

actionCalls.name: Log_No_Line_Items_on_Opportunity
actionCalls.label: Log - No Line Items on Opportunity

actionCalls.name: Log_Service_Didn_t_Need_Validation_Checks
actionCalls.label: Log - Service Didn't Need Validation Checks

value.stringValue: No Demographic Validation Checks Were Needed For the Product
Validated Only. No Demographics were Checked

assignments.description: This just adds the Product2 Id to a collection.
assignments.name: Add_Product_Id_to_Collection_of_Product_Ids
assignments.label: Add Product Id to Collection of Product Ids

assignments.description: To help with performance we will set a count which can be used in a decision later on to determine if we need to do further checks or not.
assignments.name: Set_Count_of_Product_Lab_Order_Configuration
assignments.label: Set Count of Product Lab Order Configuration

assignments.name: Set_Error_No_Items_On_Opportunity
assignments.label: Set Error - No Items On Opportunity

value.stringValue: There are no line items on the opportunity.
There are No Labs that Support the Service: {!rec_OpportunityLineItem.Product2.Services_Provided__c}

assignments.name: Set_Filtered_Value_from_Lab_Order_Configuration
assignments.label: Set Filtered Value from Lab Order Configuration

assignments.name: Set_Lab_Order_Status_Order_Held_Missing_Demographics
assignments.label: Set Lab Order Status - Order Held - Missing Demographics

value.stringValue: The Opportunity Product is Missing Demographics. Please go to the Opportunity and add the missing demographics.

assignments.description: Here we will set the output value to true to allow other flows know there is at least one item that requires shipping.
assignments.name: Set_Requires_Shipping_to_TRUE
assignments.label: Set Requires Shipping to TRUE

assignments.description: Here we set the services provided from the opportunity line item product. This will be used in this flow and as an output value.
assignments.name: Set_Services_Provided
assignments.label: Set Services Provided

decisions.description: Here wewill check if there are any product lab provider configuration records. If there is then we will continue, else we will skip these steps
decisions.name: Are_There_Product_Lab_Provider_Configuration_Records
decisions.label: Are There Product Lab Provider Configuration Records
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Has Product Lab Provider Configuration Records

rules.name: No_Product_Lab_Provider_Configuration_Records
rules.label: No Product Lab Provider Configuration Records

decisions.name: Are_We_Missing_Patient_Demographics_GT
decisions.label: Are We Missing Patient Demographics - GT

rules.name: All_Patient_Demographic_Data_Filled_In_GT
rules.label: All Patient Demographic Data Filled In - GT

decisions.name: Are_We_Missing_Patient_Demographics_PGT
decisions.label: Are We Missing Patient Demographics - PGT

rules.name: All_Patient_Demographic_Data_Filled_In_PGT
rules.label: All Patient Demographic Data Filled In - PGT

decisions.description: Here we are checking if the item we are looping over requires shipping or not. If it does then we will mark the bool_isRequiresShipping to true. We will never reset this and set to false once we have set this to true.
decisions.name: Does_This_Item_Require_Shipping
decisions.label: Does This Item Require Shipping

decisions.description: For Precision medication it is possible that there will be multiple line items which later need to create multiple lab orders. If it is true, we need to store them in a collection
decisions.name: Is_it_a_Precision_Medication
decisions.label: Is it a Precision Medication or Book

decisions.description: To be honest not sure if we need this. But if it is filled in we will just leave it. Normally there won't be two different services that will be provided from a single opportunity. As of today this will be true.
decisions.name: Is_Services_Provided_Set
decisions.label: Is Services Provided Set
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Services Provided is NOT filled in

decisions.name: Was_There_a_Line_Item_Found
decisions.label: Was There a Line Item Found

decisions.name: What_Service_and_Is_Required_Shipping
decisions.label: What Service and Is Required Shipping

rules.name: Service_Provided_Genetic_Testing_In_Person
rules.label: Service Provided = Genetic Testing - In Person

rules.name: Service_Provided_Precision_Genetic_Testing_In_Person
rules.label: Service Provided = Precision Genetic Testing - In Person

decisions.description: Based on if we need to use the lab or the distribution centers sku we will add this to the collection of skus
decisions.name: What_Type_of_SKU_is_needed
decisions.label: What Type of SKU is needed

Flow.description: This will go through the Opportunity Line Items that provide a service and return the lab SKU's in a collection.
Flow.interviewLabel: Autolaunch - Lab Order - Create Collection of Serviceable Items and Their Lab SKU's {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Autolaunch - Lab Order - Create Collection of Serviceable Items and Their Lab SKU's

loops.name: Loop_Thru_Filtered_Lab_Provider_Configuration
loops.label: Loop Thru Filtered Lab Provider Configuration

loops.description: This loop strictly gets the product ids to be used in the Get Product Lab Order Configuration Get Query
loops.name: Loop_Thru_Line_Items_Get_Product_Ids
loops.label: Loop Thru Line Items - Get Product Ids

variables.description: If any product is set to requires shipping then this will be true.
variables.name: bool_isRequiredShipping

variables.description: We have two different SKU's that can be used we need to be able to dictate within this flow what we return out of requested items array.
variables.name: bool_useDistributionSku

variables.description: This will be useed to validate that there are line items that are servicable for shipping purposes.
variables.name: bool_Validate

variables.description: This will get the service that is provided. A single opportunity should
variables.name: txt_ServiceProvided
